title: THETA Control Room — Build Hook Delta

changedProjects.lastKnownStatus: Build hook reported latest project state.
changedProjects.nextAction: v0.3.1 — UI hotfix: GRIT tape panel bottom cluster (DRIVE/TONE/WEAR + MIX) no longer overlaps the TAPE stock selector (compact slider rows + tighter selector spacing). DSP unchanged from v0.3.0. Validate the WEAR feel by ear now that all four controls are visible. Fast-follow (v0.3.2): tape-breathing modulation noise, retire the AGE LFO tab, tune the WEAR mapping.
